message:
fix(test): update tests for crew DefaultOverrides (PreCompact hook)

The handoff --cycle merge (gt-op78) added a crew PreCompact override
via DefaultOverrides(). Two tests assumed crew had no built-in overrides:
- TestComputeExpectedNoBase: now verifies crew gets PreCompact hook
- TestSyncTargetUnchanged: uses ComputeExpected to build matching settings

Also fixes stale "currently empty" comment in ComputeExpected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
